homePage.title: Yapon tilini <gradient>osonlik</gradient> bilan o'rganing va rivojlantiring
homePage.description: Chiroyli PDF darsliklar yarating, o'z rivojlanishingizni kuzatib boring va AI yordamida yaponcha lug'atni oshiring.
homePage.aiTranslationDescription: Kontekst bilan birga darhol yaponchadan o'zbekcha/ruscha/inglizchaga tarjimalar.
homePage.pdfExportDescription: Chiroyli PDF darsliklar jadval yoki karta formatida oflayn o'rganish uchun.
homePage.progressTrackDescription: O'qish jarayoningizni batafsil tahlillar bilan kuzatib boring.
homePage.jlptReadyDescription: JLPT darajalari bo'yicha tartiblangan tuzilgan o'quv yo'li.

help.title: Yordam va qo'llab-quvvatlash
help.liveChatDescription: Qo'llab-quvvatlash chatimiz orqali darhol yordam oling
help.mailSupportDescription: Elektron pochta orqali batafsil savollarni yuboring

ranking.error: Reytingni yuklashda xatolik yuz berdi. Iltimos, qayta urinib ko'ring.
